message:
feat(core,parser,svg): implement classDef/style/linkStyle pipeline

Add end-to-end support for Mermaid style directives, the biggest
remaining parity gap with legacy FrankenTUI.

## IR Types (fm-core)
- Add IrStyleTarget enum: Class(name), Node(id), Link(index)
- Add IrStyleRef struct: target + CSS property string + span
- Add style_refs field to MermaidDiagramIr

## Parser (fm-parser)
- extract_style_directives() scans raw input for classDef/style/linkStyle
- classDef: maps class name to CSS properties
- style: maps node ID to CSS properties (resolved via node_id_by_key)
- linkStyle: maps edge index to CSS properties
- IrBuilder gains push_style_ref() and node_id_by_key() methods

## SVG Renderer (fm-render-svg)
- resolve_node_inline_style(): cascades classDef → style for each node
- resolve_edge_inline_style(): applies linkStyle by edge index
- Resolved styles applied as inline style= attributes on shape elements
- CSS properties like fill, stroke, stroke-width now take effect

## Layout (fm-layout)
- Fix non-exhaustive ArrowType match for new variants:
  ThickLine, DottedLine, DoubleArrow, DoubleThickArrow, DoubleDottedArrow
- Double arrow types set both marker_start and marker_end

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
